feed.title: Bens Notes
feed.subtitle: Public metadata mirror for indexing and accessibility.

entry.title: Browser Lab Notebook 27
entry.summary: Notes on the offline mirror, indexing drift, and the article export path after the live sign-in flow changed.

entry.title: Field Report 18
entry.summary: Observed how the public mirror stayed ahead of the interactive reader and preserved long-form content history.

entry.title: Format Drift and Search Excerpts
entry.summary: Why the feed only carries excerpts, how the full text moves through the client bundle, and what stayed stable.

entry.title: Lab Snapshot 14
entry.summary: Collected article fragments, route metadata, and timeline notes from the static export and the offline reader.

entry.title: Indexing Window 09
entry.summary: Search-visible metadata remained public even after the article bodies moved behind the workspace gate.

entry.title: Mirror Hygiene 06
entry.summary: Cleaning the exported archive made the public feed clearer while the full offline archive stayed bundled separately.

entry.title: Capture Windows 03
entry.summary: Recorded how article revisions were packed for the reader and how the public mirror exposed only titles and two-line excerpts.

entry.title: Archive Formats 01
entry.summary: Initial notes on shipping a compact feed while the complete article set stayed in the archive bundle for the reader.
